creator: wen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Here is a simple patch to update gunicorn:

--- Makefile    (revision 422914)
+++ Makefile    (working copy)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$

 PORTNAME=      gunicorn
-PORTVERSION=   19.4.5
+PORTVERSION=   19.6.0
 CATEGORIES=    www python
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}

Index: distinfo
===================================================================
--- distinfo    (revision 422914)
+++ distinfo    (working copy)
@@ -1,2 +1,3 @@
-SHA256 (benoitc-gunicorn-19.4.5_GH0.tar.gz) = b00921adb5c7d786b2b22416a03d0e4586209d754c1dde302c10981bcbf09fe0
-SIZE (benoitc-gunicorn-19.4.5_GH0.tar.gz) = 405132
+TIMESTAMP = 1475186395
+SHA256 (benoitc-gunicorn-19.6.0_GH0.tar.gz) = 1e0de4957bea60bfcff5215664bdfc3cf02c78e2aae9586766a9b4b437aebbb0
+SIZE (benoitc-gunicorn-19.6.0_GH0.tar.gz) = 410291

would you have a test of it ?

wen
